name: Angel Hair Tomato Basil Toss
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet.
2. Add garlic and green onions, stir-fry for one minute.
3. Stir in tomatoes, basil, salt, and pepper; cook 2 minutes, stirring frequently.
4. Prepare pasta according to package directions; drain.
5. Toss tomato mixture with hot pasta, adding any cooked meats at this time.
6. Serve immediately and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
7. Refrigerate leftovers.
